posts.text: Just returned from the #NeonCitadel in Earth-7. The architecture defies physics — buildings rotate on their own axis every 6 hours. Brought back three artefacts. @axiom.absolute you need to see this.

comments_data.text: The rotating buildings are a known anomaly in that sector. Be careful with those artefacts — they emit temporal radiation.
Cross-referencing with our dimensional database now. Earth-7 architecture is unlike anything in the known multiverse.

posts.text: WARNING to all operatives — the #MirrorRealm is experiencing a phase shift. Entry portals are unstable between coordinates 44.7 and 89.2. Reroute your missions accordingly. Stay safe out there. #TemporalAlert #MirrorRealm

comments_data.text: Confirmed. Our sensors picked this up 20 minutes ago. All Mirror Realm missions have been suspended pending stabilization.

posts.text: Mission debrief from #Epoch1923 — Paris during the surrealist movement is even more bizarre than the history books suggest. The artists were onto something real. Salvador Dali personally handed me a painting. It moves when you look away. Catalogued as Artefact-1923-D. #TemporalMission #Surrealism

comments_data.text: A painting that moves? That is either temporal bleed or dimensional seepage. Has it been contained properly?
The surrealists were documented to have contact with dimensional entities. This confirms our hypothesis.

posts.text: Cracked the encryption on the #QuantumNull transmission we intercepted last week. The message is from us. Future versions of our team are sending warnings back through the dimensional signal grid. I cannot share the full contents here — classified Omega level — but if you are assigned to the Kepler mission next cycle, reconsider. #Classified #TemporalWarning

comments_data.text: This is not the first time we have received transmissions from our future selves. The Kepler mission coordinators need to see this immediately.
I am pulling the Kepler mission files now. Something does not add up about the departure window they scheduled.
Reassigning to backup mission effective immediately. Not taking any chances with a future-self warning.

posts.text: Back on Earth-Prime after 14 days in the #CrystalExpanse reality. Time moves differently there — I aged approximately 4 hours while 14 days passed here. The flora is bioluminescent and communicates via low-frequency vibration. Brought back soil samples for dimensional botany. My whole perspective has shifted. #DimensionalTravel #CrystalExpanse

comments_data.text: The temporal dilation in the Crystal Expanse has been theorized but never confirmed by an operative. This is a significant debrief.

activity.text: VEGA opened a portal to Earth-7
